text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As we enter the new year, the academy grounds
are quiet and the air is solemn, until...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Happy! Neeeew! YEEEEAAR!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Let's train already!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket may be so eager that she couldn't
help cutting me off, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: According to the schedule, today's a holiday.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: The Derby is this year, right?! It just... just makes me feel so restless!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
The more I thought about it, the less I could sit
still—and before I knew it, I found myself in front
of your room!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket's eyes shine bright with
enthusiasm as she talks.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It would be a waste not to let her make use of
that momentum, but how exactly...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
So like, that's when I thought of it! A special New
Year's training scheme that'll bring us oodles of
good fortune!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I call it the Lucky Symbol Swoop! First we climb
up Mt. Fuji, then we eat eggplants at the top, and
finally we go down by skydiving with hawks!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: YEAH! It'll be awesome! Hold on, I gotta go buy climbing shoes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I catch her attention just in time before she
dashes off.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huh? What's wrong? Oh! You need a pair too?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she's so desperate to take action, I should
probably direct that energy into something more
productive.
choice_data_list: Let's come up with a signature finishing move!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: A marathon... Cool! That sounds fun!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I read a manga about marathons! The way they
always ran the whole distance without giving up...
Seizing victory at the last second...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Sob... Waaah! It was so moving! I won't give up either!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It isn't what I was expecting, but this is how my
new year with Winning Ticket begins.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Save my strength? You mean, like, rest?!
choice_data_list: Rest is an important part of your training!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ohh, I see! Then I gotta nail resting too!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Okay—in that case, it's time for a nap!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket promptly plops down on my desk
chair, and...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Zzz! Zzz!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She even falls asleep with enthusiasm!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It isn't what I was expecting, but this is how my
new year with Winning Ticket begins.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: A flashy finisher?! That's fire!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I've always thought it'd be sweet to have one!
Okay, let's do it!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I wanna zoom real fast, like a cheetah! Then I'll be
able to pass right through everybody else!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It isn't what I was expecting, but this is how my
new year with Winning Ticket begins.
